input_boolean.wen_shi_chuang_hu.reason: The greenhouse window opens to cool the room (R17), but physically opening a window reduces security. It should remain closed unless actively cooling.

input_boolean.wo_shi_chuang_hu.reason: The bedroom window opens to cool the room (R14), but physically opening a window reduces security. It should remain closed unless actively cooling.

input_boolean.xiao_fang_pen_lin_tou.reason: The fire sprinkler is only activated in response to a smoke alarm (R11). Its normal state is 'off' to prevent water damage. Activation indicates an emergency.

input_boolean.zhi_neng_men_suo.reason: Context implies 'on' corresponds to opening the lock (R1) and 'off' to closing/locking (R15). The locked state (off) is the normal security state.

input_boolean.zhong_yang_shui_fa.reason: The central water valve is only turned off to prevent damage when a leak is detected (R10). The normal state is 'on' to ensure water availability.
